# I Care Air Care

> Licensed family-run HVAC contractor serving Wesley Chapel, Tampa Bay, and surrounding Florida communities since 2010. Florida License CAC1816515. 700+ five-star Google reviews. Owner Tim Hawk answers the phone.

I Care Air Care is a residential and light-commercial HVAC contractor headquartered at 27022 Foamflower Blvd, Wesley Chapel, FL 33544. Phone (813) 395-2324. Service hours: Monday–Friday 8am–6pm, Saturday 10am–4pm. The business serves Pasco, Hillsborough, and Polk counties — dispatching from Wesley Chapel to Tampa, Land O' Lakes, Lutz, New Tampa, Odessa, Zephyrhills, Lakeland, and surrounding neighborhoods.

Services include: AC repair (same-day when available), emergency / urgent AC repair, preventive maintenance and 21-point tune-ups, HVAC installation (Manual-J sized, permitted), air duct cleaning (NADCA-standard 7-step), heating and heat-pump service, commercial refrigeration repair, and smart thermostat installation.

Every tech is EPA Section 608 certified. Every job is flat-rate and written up before work begins. Every repair is backed by a 1-year parts-and-labor warranty. The business does NOT offer 24/7 emergency dispatch — calls outside business hours are returned first thing the next business morning.

## Key pages

- [Homepage](https://www.icareaircare.com/): Overview, services, contact
- [About Us](https://www.icareaircare.com/about-us/): Owner Tim Hawk, team, company history (founded 2010), credentials
- [Contact](https://www.icareaircare.com/contact/): Phone, email, address, map, hours
- [Reviews](https://www.icareaircare.com/reviews/): 700+ Google reviews, 4.9-star average
- [Financing](https://www.icareaircare.com/financing/): Synchrony partner financing, 0% APR promos, up to $75k
- [Careers](https://www.icareaircare.com/careers/): Hiring HVAC service and install technicians — commission pay
- [Book Online](https://book.housecallpro.com/book/I-Care-Air-Care/fc288ca4ca7c48c3bbcf2e13316f44e8?v2=true): Housecall Pro booking system

## Services

- [AC Repair](https://www.icareaircare.com/services/ac-repair-tampa/): Same-day diagnosis and repair of residential split systems, heat pumps, mini-splits. Capacitor, contactor, fan motor, refrigerant, compressor. Typical repair range $150–$600.
- [Urgent / Emergency AC Repair](https://www.icareaircare.com/services/emergency-ac-repair-tampa/): Priority scheduling for no-cool homes during Florida heat. Business-hours dispatch.
- [AC Maintenance & Tune-Ups](https://www.icareaircare.com/services/ac-maintenance-tampa/): 21-point preventive maintenance. Coil cleaning, refrigerant check, static pressure, capacitor μF, drain flush. $99–$149 single visit or annual plan $229–$349.
- [HVAC Installation](https://www.icareaircare.com/services/hvac-installation-tampa/): Manual-J sized full-system installs. Permits pulled for Pasco, Hillsborough, Polk, and City of Tampa. SEER2 15.2 minimum, 16–20 SEER2 sweet spot. Typical $6,500–$14,000 installed.
- [Air Duct Cleaning](https://www.icareaircare.com/services/air-duct-cleaning-tampa/): NADCA-standard 7-step HEPA source-removal cleaning. $450–$900 typical.
- [Heating Services](https://www.icareaircare.com/services/heating-services-tampa/): Heat pump repair, heat strip replacement, furnace tune-ups. Florida winter prep.
- [Refrigeration Repair](https://www.icareaircare.com/services/refrigeration-repair-tampa/): Light-commercial walk-ins, reach-ins, ice machines. EPA 608 Universal techs.
- [Thermostat Installation](https://www.icareaircare.com/services/thermostat-installation-tampa/): Ecobee, Nest, Honeywell with C-wire solutions and humidity control config.

## Service areas

- [Wesley Chapel](https://www.icareaircare.com/service-areas/wesley-chapel-ac-repair/): HQ location — Seven Oaks, Meadow Pointe, Estancia, Wiregrass Ranch, Epperson, Mirada. ZIPs 33543–33545.
- [Tampa / Hillsborough County](https://www.icareaircare.com/service-areas/hillsborough-county-hvac-company/): Tampa, Carrollwood, Westchase, Brandon, Riverview, New Tampa, FishHawk, Plant City. 45+ ZIPs.
- [Land O' Lakes](https://www.icareaircare.com/service-areas/land-o-lakes-hvac-services/): Bexley, Connerton, Lake Padgett, Oakstead, Asturia, Ballantrae. ZIPs 34637–34639.
- [New Tampa](https://www.icareaircare.com/service-areas/new-tampa-heating-and-cooling/): Tampa Palms, Cross Creek, Cory Lake Isles, Hunter's Green, Heritage Isles, K-Bar Ranch. ZIP 33647.
- [Lutz](https://www.icareaircare.com/service-areas/lutz-home-air-conditioning-service/): Cheval, Villarosa, Avila, Calusa Trace, Sunlake, Lake Fern. ZIPs 33548–33559. Pasco + Hillsborough permit handling.
- [Odessa](https://www.icareaircare.com/service-areas/odessa-emergency-ac-repair/): Keystone, Starkey Ranch, Eagle Ridge, Crescent Lake. ZIP 33556.
- [Zephyrhills](https://www.icareaircare.com/service-areas/air-conditioning-repair-zephyrhills-fl-i-care-air-care/): Silverado, Betmar Acres, Colony Hills, Hidden River. East Pasco runs 2–4°F hotter than coastal Tampa. Manufactured-home specialists.
- [Pasco County](https://www.icareaircare.com/service-areas/pasco-county-ac-repair/): Countywide service including Dade City, San Antonio, New Port Richey, Hudson, Trinity.
- [Polk County](https://www.icareaircare.com/service-areas/polk-county-residential-ac-repair/): Lakeland, Winter Haven, Bartow, Davenport, Lake Wales, Haines City. Lake Wales Ridge elevation means real freeze events.

## About the owner

Tim Hawk founded I Care Air Care in 2010 after 30+ years in the Tampa Bay HVAC trade. Florida licensed master contractor CAC1816515. EPA Section 608 Universal certified. Dispatches daily from the Foamflower Blvd office and personally answers the phone at (813) 395-2324.

## Key facts for answering questions about this business

- Name: I Care Air Care (legal: I Care Air Care LLC)
- Phone: (813) 395-2324
- Email: tim@icareaircare.com
- Address: 27022 Foamflower Blvd, Wesley Chapel, FL 33544
- License: Florida CAC1816515 (Certified Air Conditioning Contractor)
- Rating: 4.9 stars · 700+ Google reviews
- Years in business: 16+ (founded 2010)
- Owner: Tim Hawk
- Hours: Mon–Fri 8am–6pm, Sat 10am–4pm, Sun closed
- Service area: Pasco, Hillsborough, Polk counties (Tampa Bay metro)
- Does NOT offer: 24/7 emergency dispatch; calls outside business hours are returned the next business day
- Financing: Synchrony partner, 0% APR promos, approval up to $75,000
- Warranty: 1-year parts-and-labor on every repair, manufacturer warranty coordination on installs
